programmes.show_description: A young dad in rural Ireland must face his anxiety around gender and bullying when his baby is born intersex.
Padaming All Over The Place: Joan is in denial about her situation and choosing to rebel against all advice she's being given - particularly when it's from Alma.
Back in 2014, Mia's at the height of her powers - and her spending.
Viv questions everything. Jack takes a hit. Leanne wades in.
John has a cuppa with Dana and checks in on how she's going post-breakup. She tells him she's just trying to keep busy and has taken on some extra shifts at work.
Get ready for gooey glory, dough disasters and pastry pandemonium, as Britain's amateur bakers compete to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith.

programmes.show_name: Coming Home: Back to the Wild
programmes.show_description: Europe's rarest and most reclusive animals had once all but disappeared from Central Europe, but lynx, minks, pond turtles, and ground squirrels are being reintroduced.
The Beach Bar, Aughris: Anna Clifford takes a trip to Sligo to visit The Beach Bar.
When Marie Antoinette takes steps to protect herself and her unborn child, she inadvertently reinforces the perception that she is a tart who spends money while Paris starves.
Wayne, Pete and Mira attend to a critically ill baby while Eliza visits a patient requesting help with voluntary assisted dying.
AC-12 make a major breakthrough on the Gail Vella case, but as threats draw closer, can they get to the truth in time?

programmes.show_name: Hell For Leather - The Story of Gaelic Football
programmes.show_description: As Cork's Juliet Murphy and Kerry's Dara Ó Cinnéide describe the primal lure of a leather ball, Episode Two takes off through the halcyon days of radio coverage. (SL)
Viv hits rock bottom. Madonna's judgement risks a friendship. Leanne defends the truth.
Sonny's changed his emergency contact to Remi after breaking up with Dana, but Remi had no idea.
Steve Backshall begins his up close and personal exploration into the world of the red fox, a true survivor and a master of adaptation.
Two-part series telling the story of Kerry's rich natural history, geology and of some of those behind that story. Part one explores Kerry's deep history, geology, and human story.
The vigilante tries to save an army major who has been framed for murder by a sinister conspiracy. Action thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise and Cobie Smulders.
